title: Brand Communications Manager- Consumer Tech
description:
about the company. 

A market-leading telecommunications and digital services group with a strong global presence and a reputation for driving innovation. This organization is a dominant force in the regional landscape, known for connecting millions of people through diverse communication channels.

about the job. 

  • Drive the evolution of a major consumer brand by executing strategic initiatives that deepen market penetration and enhance user engagement.
  • Lead multi-channel marketing campaigns to strengthen the organization's identity and market reach.
  • Utilize advanced data analytics to monitor brand health and translate insights into actionable development plans.
  • Partner with cross-functional internal teams and external agencies to ensure consistent messaging across all digital and physical platforms.
  • Oversee the end-to-end management of large-scale events and sponsorships to boost brand visibility.
  • Manage project budgets effectively to maximize impact and ensure high returns on brand investments.

skills and experience required.

  • Min 8 years of Proven track record in marketing and brand management specifically within the consumer technology or telecommunications industries.
  • Strong competency in interpreting market trends and leveraging consumer data to guide strategic decisions.
  • Exceptional communication skills with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels of a complex organization.

If you are interested in the position, please click “apply” David Lerh (EA:94C3609/ R1769977)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
